description: The image displays the logo for the Copernicus Programme, set against a white background. The logo features a large, open blue arc forming the capital 'C' of "Copernicus". The rest of the word "Copernicus" is in a dark blue, sans-serif font, with a yellow circular dot replacing the traditional dot above the letter 'i'. Below the main "Copernicus" text, the tagline "Europe's eyes on Earth" is written in a lighter blue, smaller sans-serif font.
